footer.tagline: Your trusted partner in industrial bearings
footer.newsletterText: Stay updated with our latest products and industry news.

home.heroSubtitle: Precision and reliability for various applications
home.aboutTitle: Your Trusted Partner in Industrial Bearings
home.aboutText1: Quaval is a Canadian company at the forefront of the bearing industry, specializing in the import, export, and distribution of premium rolling bearings.
home.aboutText2: Our mission is to provide original bearings that optimize our clients' operations, leading to increased production and improved quality.
home.feature1Desc: We offer high-quality original bearings from trusted brands like Kinex, ensuring optimal performance and longevity.
home.feature2Desc: Our products are designed to save money, time, and effort, leading to increased production and improved bottom line.
home.feature3Desc: We treat each customer fairly and honestly, adhering to anti-discrimination laws and maintaining the highest ethical standards.
home.featuresSubtitle: We deliver quality and reliability at every turn
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Elevate Your Machinery Performance?
home.ctaText: Join hundreds of satisfied customers who trust Quaval Bearings for their industrial needs.
home.ctaFeature1Desc: Quick delivery to minimize your downtime
home.ctaFeature3Desc: Technical assistance when you need it

catalogs.title: Catalogs & Certificates
catalogs.description: Browse authorised brand catalogs and distribution certificates inside a controlled viewer. Downloads and print-to-PDF are blocked at the UI level, and assets are delivered behind expiring URLs for additional deterrence.

implementationNotes.title: Recommended file format
implementationNotes.body: Single or segmented PDFs, 150 dpi+, optionally watermarked before upload.

implementationNotes.title: Viewer
implementationNotes.body: Next.js hosted PDF.js instance or static image flipbook (current placeholder is PDF-ready).

implementationNotes.title: DRM deterrents
body: Disable download, copy, context menu, and keyboard shortcuts.
Serve via signed URLs that rotate every 24 hours.
Watermark overlays with user/email when authenticated.

implementationNotes.title: Upload workflow
implementationNotes.body: Assets stored under /storage/catalogs/[brand]/latest.pdf; admin UI to trigger cache purge.

catalogs.certificatesDescription: View-only access. The certificates are being prepared.

catalogDescriptions.ntn: Upload the latest NTN master catalog PDF to /public/catalogs/ntn.pdf when provided.
catalogDescriptions.snr: Supports segmented PDFs per product line if needed.
catalogDescriptions.bower: North American heavy-duty catalog. Accepts PDF or high-resolution page images.
catalogDescriptions.bca: Automotive aftermarket catalog. Multi-volume upload supported.
catalogDescriptions.quaval: In-house design catalog. Provide print-ready PDF for upload.
catalogDescriptions.dkf: Legacy archive may require per-chapter digitisation.
catalogDescriptions.kinex: Official export catalog from HQ preferred.
catalogDescriptions.timken: Timken master catalog requires DRM watermark from client legal team.

bearingFinder.description: Enter bearing dimensions and type to surface the Quaval-branded part number and compatible OEM series. The ruleset is maintained by the technical team through an admin uploader that accepts CSV or API feeds from approved catalogs.
bearingFinder.disclaimer: Outputs are indicative. Engineering validation required before release.

errors.incomplete: Please supply ID, OD, width, and select a bearing type to run the calculation.
errors.noMatch: No Quaval reference found for the supplied dimensions. Please review tolerances or consult engineering support.

dataAdminNotes.title: Data source
dataAdminNotes.body: Structured table keyed by ID / OD / width, tolerance band, bearing type, and target brand PN.

dataAdminNotes.title: Rule maintenance
dataAdminNotes.body: Admin console supports CSV upload, version control, and instant rollback.

dataAdminNotes.title: Output sheet
dataAdminNotes.body: Show Quaval PN, equivalent OEM references, and application notes.

dataAdminNotes.title: Integrations
dataAdminNotes.body: Optional API hooks to ERP for inventory checks and automatic quotation drafts.

rule6205.notes: Standard clearance. Recommended for general-purpose electric motors.

rule7016.notes: Contact angle 15°. Preload class P4 for high-speed spindles.

brands.title: Brand Partners
brands.description: Active authorisations and legacy collaborations across the Quaval network. Logos loop automatically and can expand as additional assets are delivered.

values.code: We model fair, open, and honest dealings in every market we serve and ensure zero tolerance for discrimination or harassment.
values.policy: A SATISFIED CLIENT IS A REPEAT CLIENT — every interaction is audited against service recovery commitments.
values.mission: To connect premium bearing manufacturers with operators worldwide through responsive sourcing, engineering collaboration, and enduring partnerships.

story.title: Quaval Story 1995 → 2025
story.description: Extracted from pages 9–14 of the company profile (final PDF to follow). Content structure mirrors the approved layout so assets can be swapped in as soon as they arrive.
story.overlayDescription: Authorised / exclusive agencies: NTN, SNR, Bower, BCA, DKF, Quaval, STC-STEYR, private brand SAM, and legacy collaborations with FAG, INA, OZAK, ZEN, KINEX and more.

timeline.detail: Founded as a specialised importer of industrial bearings for heavy industry clients.
Secured first regional distribution agreement across ASEAN markets.
Expanded into OEM technical services with on-site application engineering.
Launched private label program (SAM) to meet bespoke specification demand.
Appointed authorised agent for NTN / SNR / Bower / BCA product families.
Introduced digital catalog curation with controlled access for partners.
Awarded exclusive distribution for STC-STEYR within primary markets.
Preparing omnichannel parts intelligence and bearing calculation services.

industries.title: Industries Served
industries.description: Tailored inventory programs, engineering support, and reliability services for complex operating environments.

chat.title: Interactive Support Assistant
chat.description: Embed an always-on chatbot that routes enquiries to the right sales engineer. Supports WhatsApp, live chat, or custom conversational AI depending on the client’s preferred provider.
bullets: Options: Crisp, Tawk.to, Zoho SalesIQ, or bespoke GPT workflow.
Branding: use the supplied representative photo for the avatar.
Suggested flow: greeting → brand selection → application details → follow-up booking.

sampleMessages.greeting: Hi! Need a bearing cross-reference or certificate? I can help.
sampleMessages.customer: I’m looking for a Timken equivalent to NTN 6205 – can you advise?
sampleMessages.response: Absolutely. Please confirm operating speed and application, and I’ll prepare options.

video.title: Short Feature Film
video.description: Slot for the animated brand movie requested by the client. Replace the placeholder video with the final edit once the production team delivers the asset.
video.specification: Recommended format: H.264 MP4, 1080p, 30fps, 30–45 seconds. Host in /public/media or via streaming CDN with signed URLs.
video.fallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

openItems.title: Open Items for Client
assets: Final PDFs for catalogs (all brands) and certificates (KSM, NTN, QUAVAL, DKF, STC-STEYR).
Confirmation of brand carousel logos (SVG preferred) for Timken, FAG, INA, SAM, JMC, EASE, Deutsche Grobwalzlager.
Company profile pages 9–14 in high-resolution text/imagery.
Animated film file or streaming link.
configuration: Preferred catalog viewer: embedded PDF.js vs. image flipbook vs. third-party DRM.
Watermark copy and whether to personalise per user session.
Bearing Finder data scope: initial brands, tolerance rules, API integrations.
Chatbot provider and escalation workflow (sales vs. service desk).
